themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "He that is far off shall die of the pestilence; and he that is near shall fall by the sword;...". Word-study detail reinforces "וְהַקָּרוֹב֙: and he that is near - near (in place, kindred or time)".

themes.label: New Birth
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes regeneration, new life, spiritual birth, or becoming God’s children.
